concerns.text: Plan claims 'All citations limited to the three verified CSV URLs' (Constitution Check, Principle II) but research.md explicitly states 'NO verified source found' for Electricity, Traffic, and Synthetic Control datasets. This contradiction must be resolved before implementation. Either provide verified URLs or acknowledge the datasets will be fetched via ucimlrepo without pre-verification.

Primary datasets (UCI Electricity, Traffic, Synthetic Control) lack verified source URLs. Constitution Principle II requires every external citation to be verified by Reference-Validator Agent. The plan cannot claim verified accuracy while admitting no verified source exists for core data resources.
